name: honey_ports
description: Very simple but effective docker deployed honeypot to detect port scanning in your environment. Tool: https://github.com/run41/honey_ports. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #596 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map honey_ports output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved honey_ports output file to parse instead of running it live.
